ham.subject: Your AcmeCRM Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We hope you’re enjoying the full capabilities of AcmeCRM. This is a friendly reminder that your current subscription plan, "Professional," will expire on 15 May 2026. To keep uninterrupted access, please renew by 15 May 2026. The renewal fee is $199.99 per month.

If you wish to change your plan or pause billing, simply visit <URL>.

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best regards,
AcmeCRM Support Team
AcmeCRM, Inc.
support@acmecrm.com

spam.subject: URGENT: FedEx Delivery Fee Not Paid – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear FedEx Customer,

This is FedEx Customer Service. Our records show that your package (Tracking #123456789) was scheduled for delivery on 10 April 2026 but was not delivered due to a missing delivery fee. A delivery fee of $25.00 remains outstanding.

If you do not pay the fee within 48 hours, the package will be returned to the sender and you may incur additional charges. Please complete the payment immediately by visiting <URL> and entering your FedEx account details.

If you believe this notice is incorrect, contact FedEx Customer Support at 1-800-225-5325.

Thank you,
FedEx Customer Service Team
